description: A customer wants to book a dinner cruise package on the Seine River in Paris.

nodes.task_description: Search for available dinner cruise packages on the desired date.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds several dinner cruise options with different menus and prices.

nodes.task_description: Present the options to the customer and help them select a package.

expected_outcome.value: Customer selects the 'Prestige Menu' dinner cruise.

nodes.task_description: Book the selected dinner cruise package and process the payment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully books the package and provides a voucher.
